name: verboo-vision-fallback
description: Fallback de visão configurável para modelos de texto no Verboo Code 0.12.0+.

scripts.validate:verboo: verboo plugin validate .claude-plugin/plugin.json && verboo plugin validate .claude-plugin/marketplace.json
scripts.check: npm run check:syntax && npm run validate:plugin-offline && npm run validate:verboo && npm test

author: Natan Pimentel
